results.rendered_html:
irāvat a.
1 Granting drink or refreshment, satiating.
2 Endowed with provisions, comfortable.
— m.
— (vān)
1 Ocean.
2 A cloud.
3 A king.
4 N. of a son of Arjuna.
— tī
1 N. of a river in the Panjab (rāvī).
2 N. of a plant.
3 N. of Durgā, Rudra's wife.
